series_metadata.series_title: Bureau of Infectious Diseases: Animal Bite Reports
series_metadata.series_description: This series includes reports on the number of reported animal bites. Animal bites must be report to the Ohio Department of Health by local health departments under 3701-3-28(B).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 5 years. Review for Archival content; if no historical value, destroy. Archival review conducted by State Archives. ; Electronic: Retain in office 5 years. Review for Archival content; if no historical value, destroy. Archival review conducted by State Archives., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
